title: solidago camporum var. tricostata
intro: Solidago camporum var. tricostata, also known as California yellow daisy, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Canada. It is a member of the asteraceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and has been used to treat colds, sore throats, and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Solidago camporum var. tricostata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to the affected area.
